payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Black leather (or leatherette) three-seat recliner-style couch with segmented, heavily padded back cushions, stitched seam paneling and visible seat divisions; padded armrests and a slight glossy surface; nearly fully visible in the crop and roughly 2.0 m from the camera (couch width ~2.0–2.2 m estimated).
